title: chilianthus lobulatus
intro: Chilianthus lobulatus, also known as the "Blue Dragon" or "Lobelia," is a flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Chilianthus lobulatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
